title: nepeta nepetella subsp. cordifolia
intro: Nepeta nepetella subsp. cordifolia, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and soothing respiratory problems, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. Wood Betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
